node.text: Performing live always fuels Calvin's soul and gives him a rush and a powerful connection with the crowd.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "soul fuel passion") on Session 7 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Calvin described Tokyo as buzzing with energy and the festival crowd as lively.

node.text: Calvin owns a Ferrari and is attached to it, finding servicing it stressful but rewarding.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "soul fuel passion") on Session 12 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Calvin recognizes that working on cars can be a real escape from reality and understands the feeling of doing what you love for a living.
